name: PlayGolf MSK
about: PlayGolf MSK is an indoor golf destination located at 150 Woodward Rd. in Manalapan, NJ, specializing in Trackman iO simulator play, golf lessons, junior golf programs, and parties. The facility offers year-round golf access through its four simulator bays, equipped with Trackman iO technology for precise shot tracking and data analysis. Available services include professional coaching sessions, junior golf programs with structured instruction and playtime, and the use of the PUTTR Putting Coach for putting improvement. The venue caters to golfers of all ages and abilities and is suitable for hosting private events such as birthday parties and team outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional instruction with Trackman technology for data-driven feedback
Junior programs combining lessons with simulator play for developing players
Year-round indoor golf access regardless of weather conditions
